sys_script_client.description:
2.8.5 | 2023-09-07 | raj | STRY0136615 - STRY0136615 - STRETCH-PLACEHOLDER- Header UI Control 2.7.3 | 2022-04-27 | raj | DFCT0010790 - Opening "Request" modal causes "Warnings" in log: "Invalid query detected, please check logs for details [Unknown field null in table [table]" in function openRequestModal() 2.7.1 | 2021-12-10 | mmcc | STRY0115408 - Long text needs to be shortened and have an ellipsis added with uib-tooltip control to show full text; Added footer style display none
2.7 STRY0103010 - Respond Clarification Request modal does not show the correct fields and has no submit button. STRY0102985 - Respond Reassignment has no submit button. Does not seem to be related to a task. STRY0101757 - Respond Extension Request button does not appear on Platform, once added had no submit button STRY0104533 - Respond Extension should be available from more states and for Task Owner's Task Manager and Task Administrators DFCT0010643 - Remove "Context Menu" from a "New" Organizational Hierarchy " Request Update" on Portal
2.6 - fix Respond Clarification Request Header - localize all headers 2.5.317 STRY0088787 - MODALS - (Portal/Platform) Task form Save Confirmation Message displays when updating task form before selecting an UI Modal
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Modal Save Changes Message Tasker - Title - Respond Clarification Request Tasker - Title - Request Clarification Tasker - Title - Respond Extension Request Tasker - Title - Request Extension Tasker - Title - Respond Reassignment Request Tasker - Title - Request Reassignment
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit Open Request Modal
